meta.title: A method for determining the utilisation of glucose by mycoplasmas -- Edward and Moore 8 (3): 451 -- Journal of Medical Microbiology

abstractHtml: A technique for measuring glucose utilisation by mycoplasmas, in which the disappearance of glucose is monitored by the glucose-oxidase method, is proposed as an alternative to the pH method. For maximum reliability the number of organisms in the test suspension must exceed a critical minimum value. Differences in efficiency of glucose utilisation were demonstrated between species of Mycoplasma and Acholeplasma.
